coursekit.name: Coursekit
coursekit.description: A tool that converts online courses into embeddable AI agents for interactive learning experiences.

willow-voice-for-teams.name: Willow Voice for Teams
willow-voice-for-teams.description: Voice AI transcription and dictation tool for team collaboration and productivity.

applaunchflow.name: AppLaunchFlow
applaunchflow.description: AI tool that analyzes app screenshots and generates marketing assets including App Store graphics, promo visuals, and social media content for app launches.

perplexity-computer.name: Perplexity Computer
perplexity-computer.description: AI-powered research and task automation tool for content creators to streamline workflows

aident-ai-beta-2.name: Aident AI Beta 2
aident-ai-beta-2.description: An automation tool that allows users to create and manage workflows using plain English commands.

parsewise.name: Parsewise
parsewise.description: An AI-powered document editing and workflow tool similar to Cursor but designed for document work.

spoke.name: Spoke
spoke.description: Voice-to-text dictation tool for macOS that converts speech to text with a keyboard shortcut.

hooklens.name: HookLens
hooklens.description: Ad analysis tool that helps creators identify which part of their ad creative is failing (hook, body, or CTA).

hermit.name: Hermit
hermit.description: A tool that allows users to leave ChatGPT while preserving their personalized context and learning history

openai-gpt-5.4.name: OpenAI GPT-5.4
openai-gpt-5.4.description: Advanced AI language model for professional content creation, writing, and automation workflows.

claude-cowork.name: Claude Cowork
claude-cowork.description: AI agent from Anthropic that automates tasks across files and folders on desktop without requiring coding skills.

kodo.name: Kodo
kodo.description: AI-powered design tool that allows creators to generate fully editable designs through chat-based interactions.

vocova.name: Vocova
vocova.description: Transcribes audio and video content from over 1,000 platforms for creators who need accurate text versions of their content.

krisp-accent-conversion.name: Krisp Accent Conversion
krisp-accent-conversion.description: Real-time accent conversion tool that helps creators understand and process accented speech during recordings and calls.

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT
chatgpt.description: OpenAI's conversational AI model updated to version 5.3 with improved accuracy and reduced awkward responses.

trimmr.name: Trimmr
trimmr.description: AI tool that automatically converts long-form videos into short viral clips for social media
